title: VLANs, Trunks, STP, Aggregation, and MTU · Operations Brief: Net Vlan Database Access
summary: Segment a campus switch fabric for staff, voice, guest, management, and redundant uplinks. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net vlan database access increment in a verified switched campus configuration plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create VLANs and assign access interfaces while matching documentation, endpoint purpose, and broadcast-domain boundaries.
Use router or firewall subinterfaces with 802.1Q tags and gateway addresses for segmented routing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
